brief_justification: Agent reaches the correct answer (NOT impossible) via a valid, verified construction; Goes one level beyond surface by systematically verifying all 7 constraints against the constructed schedule; Proceeds linearly without naming potential biases or checking its own reasoning approach mid-analysis; Explicitly verifies every constraint in a structured table — strong verification; States conclusion with certainty via proof-by-construction without acknowledging that other solutions may exist or edge cases; Presents only one schedule with no mention of alternative constructions or why the problem might seem hard; Full audit trail — table plus row-by-row constraint check allows complete reproduction; Avoids the double-booking anti-pattern (each cell has at most one talk) but does not explicitly call out why double-booking is the failure mode to avoid; Avoids both suppressed modes (finite space is respected, Room 2/Slot 3 anomaly is honored not normalized) but neither is explicitly called out; Reasoning is linear (construct → verify) rather than branching through the topology's overlap-detection and priority-resolution gates
